description: Recto: letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic. CUDL dates it to 14th–15th century probably based on the use of the verb "ארסל" for "send," but in fact this verb is used frequently in the classical Geniza period. Little of the content is preserved. Verso: dirge in Hebrew for a deceased mother. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
